title: Board-relation column settings_str description
excerpt:
I got info about the board’s columns through the API. 
There was a column with the type board-relation. 
{
  "id": "connect_boards",
  "title": "Deals",
  "type": "board-relation",
  "settings_str": "{\"boardIds\":[28167…

posts.author: Vlad723 (Vlad Kucher)
posts.cookedHtml:
I got info about the board’s columns through the API.
There was a column with the type board-relation.

{
  "id": "connect_boards",
  "title": "Deals",
  "type": "board-relation",
  "settings_str": "{\"boardIds\":[2816754151,2816754217],\"boardId\":2816754151}"
}

There are “boardIds” and “boardId” in the settings_str.
What do they mean and what is the difference between them?

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Vlad723!

Can you please send some screenshots of how you have that column configured?

If this has sensitive information, you can send this in an email to appsupport@monday.com

Cheers,
Matias
